name: backchannel
description: E2E-encrypted shared context across separate Codex/Claude Code sessions. An auto-syncing background channel.

interface.shortDescription: Shared context across separate AI coding sessions.
interface.longDescription: A private, end-to-end-encrypted background channel that keeps separate AI coding sessions aware of each other's progress. Separate sessions, shared context, no shared execution.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start a backchannel room to share context with a teammate.
